title: Bloody sword
description: Adds a sword made of blood to the game
body:
Bloody sword - a sword made from your own blood, this is an endgame weapon, the owner of the sword knows real power

The sword was created for those who have monsters of such strength that ordinary weapons cannot cope, but to get it you need to defeat a dragon

The sword has the ability to heal the owner when it hits a creature
The sword has an ability on the right mouse button, it enhances and destroys the player’s life depending on the difficulty of the game, hardcore players will not like this
